title: Style Hero Section CTA Button with Yellow Background

requirements.summary: Update the 'Our Services' CTA button in HeroSection.tsx to have a yellow background box matching the brand yellow used in ServicesSection.tsx heading
acceptanceCriteria: The action/CTA button in HeroSection.tsx has a yellow background box, consistent with the brand yellow color.
Button text is legible (black or dark font) against the yellow background.
The 'OUR SERVICES' heading yellow box in ServicesSection.tsx remains unchanged.
No other sections or styles are affected.

file_operations.description: Update the 'Our Services' scroll/action button styling to use a yellow background (bg-yellow-400 or the brand yellow custom color) and ensure text color is dark (text-navy-900 or text-black) for proper contrast. Keep all other button properties (padding, border-radius, hover effects) intact. Do not modify any other elements in the HeroSection.
